failure_reason: Made BML choiceReceipt route selection executable. bml-route-choice-runtime consumes trusted BML choice metadata, resolves it to a real kernel-http kh-route-candidate, escalates low-trust local metadata to an oracle route, and returns an inspectable signature. kernel-http passes 536965066 four-way and bml-route-choice-runtime passes 32767 four-way; the large composite floor passes 32767 on Go/Rust/TS and remains an explicit fourth-arm mismatch at fkwu=15.
